textByHash.ff662a94f2a801bb75febcfe5ed9a9c3bc552fce: Indeed, and if Baxtorian sent you, then it is time for me to leave this place. Tell me human, where must I travel to?
textByHash.34a87db053f5772e216b377502a25283ff366b46: Then we shall leave at once. Allow me to teleport you back with me.
textByHash.ccd0dae6bbd4262e822bb08200fc08398e3f5c55: The rebels have created a wonderful village here. A safe refuge from the tyranny of Lord Iorwerth. Curious how something so beautiful could be born of something so terrible.
textByHash.2e4dd30490857e06d081a988cbf9c65147a75338: They have, but I'd expect no less of them. The song of the elves has been sung for thousands of years, it will continue for thousands more.
textByHash.355ae4d9056a2f67e7881bacc18676abd9f4fe16: However, I fear that this verse is the darkest yet.
textByHash.3b56f42ea840f064feec3412f3b21e8e8d0ae97f: My magic can be used to teleport someone through the defences and into the crystal. It will require great focus though, I will only be able to send one of you in.
textByHash.218689b590a83d21f9f96afa58f8c2881b241324: The Grand Library of Prifddinas, such a beautiful place. You will be the first to step foot there for hundreds of years.
textByHash.58e625940ead3d06ee894d0c5e11d1d250206f93: They say Lord Iorwerth broke one of the nine seals of Seren within the library. Find this seal, and see what knowledge he uncovered.
textByHash.d8472ec5fffd591a5640e5e22657a8358325130e: Once that is done, seek out the other eight seals, see if you can break them as well. Their knowledge may be key to our fight against the darkness.
textByHash.352ad683ad3fc9d640028c93089b97cdc06392fc: According to Baxtorian, Seren herself said that those who follow the light will be able to access her knowledge.
textByHash.1736b951857ab88043c88eb8c9d2cb27fb175736: No, but it is all you have. Now, when you are ready, I can teleport you into the crystal seed. I have the potion that you made earlier, it will ensure you survive the journey.
textByHash.ad92fb1b49a229c56e109855d2b05ed0ee564751: One last thing, the laws that this land abide by, they may not apply in the library.
textByHash.283d6f8c24e9013d618c474c57f0f3b673227c5a: The library has been reverted to crystal. That which is impossible out here, may well be normal in an environment like that. You should be cautious.
textByHash.a8667f731a0a2a268b1caedc273f2f6b11fc9da0: Do you wish to return to the Grand Library?
textByHash.0cbe5c458bfde6b620776f1819ed7d0484fce81d: Your work in the library, is it done?
textByHash.4c1846486d1a0f85e47f1e21b500a0148a65bf91: Then you should speak with Arianwyn at once.
textByHash.890ec812215bb885b146f299803435cfa8b5ab6c: So here we are. At long last, the end is upon us. The only question that remains is who it's the end for.
textByHash.d3651a1e5b8ed62a7fcfbc6c7b3b1052d15eedd3: No war lasts forever, not even this one. The darkest verse of the song of the elves is upon us. Who knows what the next verse will be.
textByHash.fbe1d8e9349e5bbca2f1a7b2ff4164200f0aa488: Good day . Have you come to hear the song of the elves?
textByHash.58ff6ff748a5fa247e8b221b8a3b2c50d46ac70e: Do you not hear it? The sounds of a city in harmony. It is the song of the elves, the story of our people.
textByHash.2dbcce123a90b168f9f47d0550b8add0ff963863: The last few verses were dark and quiet, but now our city is restored, we find ourselves singing a new verse, one of joy and light.
textByHash.ea9ad1e03cbfb64242c9a0d324f2de08c2fe1b25: More of a fighter? We have a song for that too. If you wish to sing it, head to the Gauntlet and put yourself to the test.
